description: Quickly search for and insert emojis into your editor.

manifest.author: oliveryh
manifest.description: Quickly search for and insert emojis into your notes.
manifest.name: Emoji Toolbar

name: Emoji Toolbar

releases.author: oliveryh
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Update twemoji to v16 by @oliveryh in https://github.com/oliveryh/obsidian-emoji-toolbar/pull/79
* Update emoji-mart to v5.6.0 by @oliveryh in https://github.com/oliveryh/obsidian-emoji-toolbar/pull/81
* Fix shifted picker in modal by @oliveryh in https://github.com/oliveryh/obsidian-emoji-toolbar/pull/82
* Use latest Obsidian API types by @oliveryh in https://github.com/oliveryh/obsidian-emoji-toolbar/pull/85
* Support inserting emojis into canvas by @oliveryh in https://github.com/oliveryh/obsidian-emoji-toolbar/pull/87
* Format and lint files by @oliveryh in https://github.com/oliveryh/obsidian-emoji-toolbar/pull/88
* Rationalise dependencies by @oliveryh in https://github.com/oliveryh/obsidian-emoji-toolbar/pull/89
* Release v1.0.0 by @oliveryh in https://github.com/oliveryh/obsidian-emoji-toolbar/pull/91


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oliveryh/obsidian-emoji-toolbar/compare/0.4.1...1.0.0

releases.author: oliveryh
releases.description:
**Bugfixes**
- [#61](https://github.com/oliveryh/obsidian-emoji-toolbar/issues/61) - Insertion failed when the focus is not in the editing area

releases.author: oliveryh
releases.description:
**Features**
- [#54](https://github.com/oliveryh/obsidian-emoji-toolbar/issues/54) - Turn twemoji off by default

**Bugfixes**
- [#56](https://github.com/oliveryh/obsidian-emoji-toolbar/issues/56) - Sync Emoji Mart display with twitter emoji setting

releases.author: oliveryh
releases.description:
**Bugfixes**
- [#39](https://github.com/oliveryh/obsidian-emoji-toolbar/issues/39) - Fixed issue where emoji are being inserted at start of document

releases.author: oliveryh
releases.description:
**Bugfixes**
- [#28](https://github.com/oliveryh/obsidian-emoji-toolbar/issues/28) - Better support for themes
- [#27](https://github.com/oliveryh/obsidian-emoji-toolbar/issues/27) - Allow pressing enter from the search bar to insert the first emoji in the list

releases.author: oliveryh
releases.description:
**Features**
- #26 - Update Emoji Library to Emoji Mart

releases.author: oliveryh
releases.description:
**Enhancements**
- [#13](https://github.com/oliveryh/obsidian-emoji-toolbar/issues/13) - Emojis now insert into search and header fields

releases.author: oliveryh
releases.description:
**Enhancements**

#5 - Upgrade to emojilib 3.0.0
#6 - Apply twitter emoji font to improve emoji support

releases.author: oliveryh
releases.description:
**Bugfix**
#1 - Move to FuzzySuggestModal after API change in v0.9.20

releases.author: oliveryh
releases.description:
Initial release
- Adds hotkey to Obsidian to prompt switcher
- Allows you to search for and insert emojis in your editor
